causes: test threshold 512 bytes was below the backend minimum of 65536 and therefore did not trigger rotation
first isolated runner started before readiness and exited
second isolated runner produced a truncated package warning and exited before manifest validation
Hostinger API subsequently returned Cloudflare challenge and VPS:9999 failures

generate sufficient synthetic events in a single session
accuracy_note: The audit rotation mechanism remains implemented but has not yet passed a forced threshold test.
